race.comment: LOCO STORM (1) has not raced since scoring (30.62) over 520m at Wentworth Park 12 weeks ago. Overall form off this box is sound. Looks a key player drawing the cherry. LOCO DOMINATOR (2) was prominent throughout when winning in one of the fastest times of the card two back but could manage only midfield last time when finished 5th and beaten 8 lengths at Richmond (23.63). Was a winner at his only start from this draw. Expected to feature in the finish. LOCO BOOM (4) has a strong overall record having four wins and five places from 12 starts but was out of the money last time when sixth (30.32) over 520m at Wentworth Park. Super consistent and can feature with the right run. WINGED RUPEE (8) recorded a 1.75 lengths win (19.28) in a Grade 5 last time at Bulli. Has already won out of this draw.

runners.name: Precursor
runners.owners: Velocity Lodge Synd S Williams,M Williams
